title: SORA-025 Married Woman Fall Story Yui Hatano
overview: The wife of a prefectural assembly member, Yui, blames the low-grade property proposed by banker Mabuchi for asset management and shatters her pride. The woman who is not angry is made to do a massage naked to taste more humiliation. However, the vile Mabuchi puts an aphrodisiac in the ointment and massages it, and gradually massages the shameful part of the woman whose body is burning. A woman who was attacked by pleasure and could not control her self-control was incontinent in front of Mabuchi, and her appearance was photographed.
